name: Demo Weather Mission
description: Fetches current temperature from Open-Meteo (no API key required). Demonstrates the brrmmmm host ABI.

optional_env_vars.name: LATITUDE
optional_env_vars.description: Decimal latitude of the location to fetch weather for (default: 52.52 — Berlin)

optional_env_vars.name: LOCATION_NAME
optional_env_vars.description: Human-readable label used when params.location_name is not provided.

fields.label: Location name
fields.help: Human-readable label shown in published output.
